title: Device Settings - Settings screen for connected device
scenario: Navigate to Device Settings via the "..." button with a connected headset and verify all available settings tabs are displayed
steps: 1. Connect a device (e.g., Headset) to the app.
3. Tap the '...' button to navigate to Device Settings.

5. Verify the available tabs (e.g., Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones).
expected: A settings section is displayed with tabs appropriate for the connected device (e.g., Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones).
